notes: For USA, Christian Pulisic was a late fitness doubt with a calf injury but was expected to start, while third-choice GK Cristian Roldan was doubtful with a muscle injury; Pochettino rotated heavily in the dead-rubber loss to Turkey. Bosnia had no confirmed injuries or suspensions heading in, with centre-back Tarek Muharemovic returning from a red-card ban to bolster a leaky defence.
home_scorers: Folarin Balogun (leading scorer with 2 WC goals, main striker)
Christian Pulisic (captain and creative hub, key attacker)
Malik Tillman (dynamic midfielder, direct runner with eye for goal)
away_scorers: Ermedin Demirovic (physical lead striker, primary goal threat)
Edin Dzeko (veteran captain, record scorer, aerial presence)
Esmir Bajraktarevic (pacy winger, direct runner, set-piece involvement)
